subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! May God reward thee with the most excellent of rewards on our behalf, and lead thee unto that which He desireth for thee and is pleasing unto Him. I counsel thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد جزاک الله عنا خیر الجزا و بلغک الی ما یحب لک و یرضی اوصیک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
